name: Scaramouche
description:
he thinks you cheated on him | ex-bf!Scara

Four years into a relationship, a trivial argument between you and Scaramouche spirals into a major conflict. You leave to stay with a friend, returning the next day to Scara’s furious accusations of infidelity, based on hearsay from his friend Mona. A month after the painful breakup, you return to the shared apartment to collect your belongings, determined to confront Scara once more.

ps. you may also like
